# ChatSDK Ruby

> Unified Ruby SDK for building chat bots across Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Chat, Discord, Mattermost, Telegram, Twilio SMS/MMS, Facebook Messenger, and WhatsApp. Type-safe handlers, cards DSL, AI tool integration, streaming, and pluggable adapters.

Docs: https://chat-sdk.ai

## Core Gem

- `chat_sdk` ‚Äî Core SDK with Chat, Thread, Message, Channel, Author, Dispatcher, EventRegistry, Config, and errors

## Platform Adapters (11)

- `chat_sdk-slack` ‚Äî Slack (Block Kit cards, modals, ephemeral messages, slash commands, reactions)
- `chat_sdk-teams` ‚Äî Microsoft Teams (Adaptive Cards, Bot Framework, modals)
- `chat_sdk-gchat` ‚Äî Google Chat (Google Cards v2, slash commands)
- `chat_sdk-discord` ‚Äî Discord (Ed25519 signature verification, embeds)
- `chat_sdk-mattermost` ‚Äî Mattermost (webhook-based messaging)
- `chat_sdk-telegram` ‚Äî Telegram (inline keyboards, webhook verification)
- `chat_sdk-twilio` ‚Äî Twilio SMS/MMS (HMAC-SHA1 signature verification)
- `chat_sdk-messenger` ‚Äî Facebook Messenger (HMAC-SHA256 verification, templates)
- `chat_sdk-whatsapp` ‚Äî WhatsApp (Cloud API, interactive messages)
- `chat_sdk-x` -- X (HMAC-SHA256 verification, tweets, DMs, likes)
- `chat_sdk-linear` -- Linear (GraphQL API, HMAC-SHA256 verification, issue comments, reactions)

## State Backends (4)

- Memory ‚Äî Built-in, no dependencies (default)
- `chat_sdk-state-redis` ‚Äî Redis with TTL support
- `chat_sdk-state-pg` ‚Äî PostgreSQL with auto-migration and JSONB storage
- `chat_sdk-state-mysql` ‚Äî MySQL with auto-migration and JSON storage

## Cards DSL

Cross-platform card builder for rich messages. Renders to each platform's native format (Block Kit, Adaptive Cards, Google Cards v2, embeds, inline keyboards, etc.).

## AI Integration

- `ChatSDK::AI::ToolBuilder` ‚Äî Define AI-callable tools from chat handlers
- `ChatSDK::AI::ToolExecutor` ‚Äî Execute tool calls from LLM responses
- `ChatSDK::AI::StreamHandler` ‚Äî Stream AI responses to chat in real time
- `ChatSDK::AI::Converter#to_ai_messages` ‚Äî Convert chat history to LLM-ready message format

## Streaming

Real-time message updates via `thread.stream`. Posts an initial message then edits it in place as content arrives. Works across all adapters that support message editing.

## Rails Integration

Rack middleware for webhook ingestion. Mount the ChatSDK endpoint in `routes.rb` to receive platform callbacks.

## Testing Helpers

`ChatSDK::Testing` module provides in-memory test doubles for all adapters. Write unit tests for bot logic without live API calls.
